name: in-house legal teams at law firms processing 5–15 regulatory filings/month tool
description: For in-house legal teams at law firms processing 5–15 regulatory filings/month, manual data collection causes late submissions. We automate compliance reporting instead of manual data collection and formatting.
target_audience: in-house legal teams at law firms processing 5–15 regulatory filings/month
problem_solved: Difficulty in collecting and formatting data for timely regulatory filings.
